top_signals.title: UK unveils prototype missiles for Ukraine with no US components
top_signals.summary: Low-cost, long-range weapons could be deployed as soon as this year in war against Russia
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tories’ Scotland victory adds to Reform UK’s woes
top_signals.summary: Conservatives win in Aberdeen after criticising high taxes and limits on new oil and gas exploration
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: ‘Take Risk’: Canada Regulator Cuts Bank Capital Level to Boost Lending
top_signals.summary: Canada’s financial regulator lowered capital requirements for the country’s largest banks for the first time in three years, giving them the flexibility to lend more to support a domestic push for defense spending, infrastructure and artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
